remaining_params.StackDescription: {p:You} looks at the top card of their library. If it's a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent creature card, they may put it onto the battlefield.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Look at the top card of your library. If it's a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent creature card, you may put it onto the battlefield.

params.Description: If you would scry a number of cards, scry that many cards plus one instead.
